name: mastyff-ai
description: Runtime security, cost governance, and health monitoring proxy for MCP infrastructure — three-layer detection engine (regex → schema → LLM), YAML policy engine with hot-reload, 50+ secret patterns + Shannon entropy, AST command validation, JWT algorithm pinning, default-deny fail-closed, K8s Helm with probes and NetworkPolicy

tools.name: scan_security
tools.description: Scan MCP server configurations for CVEs, hardcoded secrets, typo-squatting, auth weaknesses, and command injection

tools.name: audit_costs
tools.description: Audit token usage and estimate costs per MCP server

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check health, latency, and reliability of MCP servers

tools.name: full_report
tools.description: Generate a complete security, cost, and health report for all MCP servers

NVD_API_KEY.description: NIST NVD API key for CVE lookups (optional)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for semantic LLM analysis layer

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection for HA rate limiting and session state (required for multi-replica)

ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Slack/Discord webhook for critical policy alerts

releases.notes: Glama compatibility — fixed lockSync retries param (proper-lockfile sync API), declared logging/resources/prompts capabilities for MCP SDK v1.0.4

Production hardening — 50+ secret patterns + entropy, AST command validator, DB file locking, DI interfaces, JWT algorithm pinning, WebSocket dashboard, default-deny fail-closed, /healthz /readyz, Helm NetworkPolicy, Slack/Discord alerter, comprehensive README with 15 FAQs
Preview features — expanded secret scanner, semantic coverage, stdio retry, secret provider
Production hardening — better-sqlite3, HTTP proxy, transitive CVE, secrets, watchdog, CSP, scoring, retention
